creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
On Wed, 7 Nov 2001, Udo Schweigert wrote:
 
 # Update of port security/swatch to version 3.0.4
 
 	If I'm reading the diff below correctly this doesn't actually
 update it to 3.0.4, it bumps down to 3.0.3 from .4.
 
 	I've attached a diff at the end of this that updates the port to
 3.0.4 and adds another MASTER_SITES.B
 
 # 
 # >Fix:
 # 
 # diff -ru swatch.orig/Makefile swatch/Makefile
 # --- swatch.orig/Makefile	Wed Nov  7 16:45:48 2001
 # +++ swatch/Makefile	Tue Nov  6 02:01:10 2001
 # @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #  #
 #  
 #  PORTNAME=	swatch
 # -PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
 # +PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
 #  CATEGORIES=	security sysutils
 #  MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.stanford.edu/general/security-tools/swatch/
 #  
 # diff -ru swatch.orig/distinfo swatch/distinfo
 # --- swatch.orig/distinfo	Wed Nov  7 16:46:12 2001
 # +++ swatch/distinfo	Tue Nov  6 02:01:10 2001
 # @@ -1 +1 @@
 # -MD5 (swatch-3.0.4.tar.gz) = ce290dd2cae6ce834f59e24d97a30d3b
 # +MD5 (swatch-3.0.3.tar.gz) = 7908092d64f2a40dfd69d10363c49a4b
 # 
 
 diff -ruN swatch.orig/Makefile swatch/Makefile
 --- swatch.orig/Makefile	Wed Nov  7 11:28:42 2001
 +++ swatch/Makefile	Wed Nov  7 11:29:20 2001
 @@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	swatch
 -PORTVERSION=	3.0.3
 +PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
  CATEGORIES=	security sysutils
 -MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.stanford.edu/general/security-tools/swatch/
 +MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.stanford.edu/general/security-tools/swatch/ \
 +		http://www.oit.ucsb.edu/~eta/swatch/
  
  MAINTAINER=	joseph@randomnetworks.com
  
 diff -ruN swatch.orig/distinfo swatch/distinfo
 --- swatch.orig/distinfo	Wed Nov  7 11:28:42 2001
 +++ swatch/distinfo	Wed Nov  7 11:29:24 2001
 @@ -1 +1 @@
 -MD5 (swatch-3.0.3.tar.gz) = 7908092d64f2a40dfd69d10363c49a4b
 +MD5 (swatch-3.0.4.tar.gz) = ce290dd2cae6ce834f59e24d97a30d3b
